zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强，短线整理延续
zh.content:
当前报1.21696，价格贴近日内高位区间，整体维持窄幅震荡结构，买卖力量较为均衡，短线仍以整理蓄势为主。

MACD仍处零轴下方但柱体收敛，动能衰减明显；SMA20位于1.20970形成短期支撑，价格站稳其上方，显示中期结构偏多但缺乏突破动能。

上方阻力关注1.22352前高，突破后有望打开上行空间；下方支撑1.21227及1.20970双重防线，若失守则可能回踩更低震荡区。

操作上建议高抛低吸为主，突破1.22352可轻仓追多，跌破1.20970需谨慎观望，等待趋势方向进一步确认后再顺势布局。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is trading at 1.21696, modestly above its 20-period simple moving average of 1.20970, suggesting that short-term momentum remains mildly constructive. The price is also holding near the upper half of the daily range between 1.21227 and 1.22352, indicating that buyers continue to defend recent gains. While the 24-hour advance of 0.39% is relatively small, it reflects underlying stability rather than aggressive selling pressure.

The moving-average relationship favors a cautiously bullish outlook as long as XRP remains above the 1.20970 area. However, momentum indicators provide a more balanced picture. The MACD reading of -0.00443 remains below the neutral threshold, implying that bearish momentum has not fully disappeared despite recent price strength. Without a confirmed positive MACD crossover, traders should remain alert to the possibility of consolidation or a short-term pullback before a stronger directional move develops.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located around 1.2120–1.2100, aligning closely with the recent low and the SMA(20). A break below this zone could expose the psychological 1.2000 level. On the upside, resistance is visible near 1.2235, the session high, followed by a broader resistance area around 1.2300–1.2350 where sellers may become more active. A decisive breakout above 1.2235 would strengthen the case for continued upward momentum.

For trading purposes, conservative participants may prefer to wait for either a confirmed break above 1.2235 or a pullback toward support near 1.2100 before entering positions. Bullish traders could view dips toward support as potential accumulation opportunities while maintaining disciplined risk management below 1.2000. Conversely, if price closes below the SMA(20) and support cluster, short-term sentiment would weaken and favor a more defensive stance until momentum indicators improve.
